SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD BANK, S.B.N.A., A NATIONAL BANKING ASSOC IATION SERVED FEB-19-2004, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT POWELL, MELVIN

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-21-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUN-11-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-21-2004 CONTINUED TO SEP-01-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). JUL-21-2004 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF SEP-01-2004, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)
